interpretation_notes: Operator readings are automated public data and may be unverified.
Values above 100% are retained as published.
Capacity percentages can reflect temporary or reduced operating full-supply levels.
Queensland-wide capacity is shown as a median, not a simple or volume-weighted average across unlike storages.

dams.capacity_note: Seqwater currently publishes percentage full against a reduced full supply level. Check the operator page for the current operating basis.

Sunwater has published a temporary reduced capacity for Callide Dam. The live source value is retained as the authoritative current basis.
Kinchant Dam uses seasonal reduced full supply levels. The live source percentage and capacity basis may change by season.
